description: As Middle East tensions escalate, Russia is quietly positioning itself to benefit from the ensuing chaos. While global powers focus on the conflict, Moscow is leveraging diplomacy and energy markets to expand its influence. The crisis has boosted Russia's energy revenues and shifted international attention away from Ukraine, creating a strategic advantage for Moscow.

description: "We will be preparing for the World Cup. We will boycott the United States but not the World Cup," Taj said in a video released by the Iranian press agency Fars News Agency on Wednesday, as cited by news agency AFP.

This pragmatic approach positions Comet as a complementary tool, not a direct competitor, to Google.

Tharoor recalled an early prediction of Samson becoming the 'next Dhoni,' a sentiment later refined by Gautam Gambhir, who emphasized Samson forging his own unique path. Samson's recent match-winning innings solidified his status as a selfless and talented player.

title: 16-year-old guest worker from Assam raped by co-workers in Chennai; one held
description: In a harrowing incident in Chennai, a young guest worker from Assam, just 16 years old, has come forward with a troubling report of sexual assault at the hands of two colleagues. Authorities have arrested Ruben, the primary suspect, who is accused of not only assaulting her but also forcing her into a compromising situation with his associate, Alan Hussain.

IPL name controversy: BCCI faces legal showdown, Kerala HC steps in
description: The Kerala High Court has dismissed a plea challenging the 'Indian Premier League' name, deeming it without merit. Meanwhile, Karnataka has greenlit the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium for IPL 2026 matches, ending venue uncertainty. The 19th IPL season kicks off March 28th, with defending champions RCB facing Sunrisers Hyderabad in Bengaluru.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called it 'the next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
description: Meta is shutting down its virtual reality social network, Horizon Worlds, for Quest headsets by June 15, 2026. The platform will transition to a mobile-only experience, aiming for greater focus and growth. This move follows significant investment and struggles to attract users, with the Reality Labs division reporting substantial losses.

title: D-Street bloodbath: Sensex crashes nearly 2,500 points; Rs 11L cr investors' wealth wiped out
description: Stock market crash today: Higher crude oil prices and a hawkish stance from the US Federal Reserve weighed heavily on investor sentiment.Within minutes of trading, the sharp decline erased over Rs 11 lakh crore from the total market capitalisation of BSE-listed firms.

title: Amazon on 'failed' USPS deal: We negotiated with them in good faith for more than a year
description: Amazon clarified its relationship with USPS, stating negotiations for a renewed agreement were abruptly ended by the postal service in December after over a year of good-faith discussions. Despite submitting a bid under USPS's new auction model, Amazon awaits a response and warns of needing to invest in alternative delivery options due to planning uncertainty.

title: Nashik astrologer 'Captain' arrested for raping, blackmailing woman for 3 years
description: A 67-year-old astrologer, known as 'captain', was arrested in Nashik for allegedly raping a 28-year-old woman between 2022 and 2025. The woman's complaint details manipulation and threats, leading to her filing a case under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita and the Maharashtra Prevention of Human Sacrifice Act. Authorities are investigating potential superstitious practices alongside the sexual exploitation charges.
